page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv7 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The configuration provides 2 vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with 2 threads per core, paired with 8.0 GB of system memory. The processor includes a large 480 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1D cache, alongside advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated matrix operations.
This instance does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. It does not feature any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the D2s_v7 demonstrates strong single-threaded performance, particularly in gzip compression at 32.64 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression at 14.59 GB/sec. However, its multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth are relatively constrained, with stress-ng multi-core performance and large-block memory write bandwidth registering in the weak and poor categories respectively. Redis SET operations reach 3.94 million operations per second, and static web serving throughput is measured at 4.82 GB/sec. Given these performance characteristics and its resource density, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for entry-level general-purpose workloads, light web serving, and single-threaded processing tasks that do not require heavy multi-core scaling or high memory bandwidth.
description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with an x86_64 Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor offering 2 dedicated vCPUs from 1 physical core at 4.2 GHz, alongside 8.0 GB of RAM. The CPU features a 480 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs but is Premium Storage capable. Benchmarks indicate strong single-threaded performance in compression tasks, though multi-core CPU and memory write bandwidth performance are relatively weak. The D2s_v7 is best suited for light web serving, single-threaded processing, and basic general-purpose workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 4.2 GHz, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, optimized for light workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v7 is a general-purpose VM with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and strong single-threaded compression performance.
tagline: A dedicated dual-vCPU virtual machine featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processing and balanced memory for entry-level workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 2 vCPUs
Equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory and a large 480 MB L3 cache
Supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX
Strong single-threaded performance in gzip and bzip3 benchmarks
Premium Storage capable with no bundled local storage or GPUs
Best suited for light web serving, single-threaded tasks, and general-purpose workloads
